decisions.decision: Add inline failure mode rules to all 3 agent definitions
decisions.rationale: Scattered anti-pattern guidance exists but is incomplete. Inline 'Do NOT' rules (team.md style) prevent the model from inventing anti-patterns like TaskOutput misuse. Inline format adds ~20 words per agent vs ~50 for named tables.

decisions.decision: Add propulsion principle to all 3 agent definitions
decisions.rationale: Debugger and resolver lack 'execute immediately' language, causing agents to enter conversational loops. Implementer already has moderate propulsion. One line per agent: 'Execute immediately — do not ask for confirmation.'

decisions.decision: Add Check 6: git state health (dirty worktree, detached HEAD, stale branches)
decisions.rationale: The most common pre-work issue is dirty state or wrong branch. Doctor currently checks 5 things but not basic git health.

decisions.decision: Add merge tier summary logging to session-merge JSON output
decisions.rationale: Tier 2 auto-resolve exists but is invisible — MergeResult only reports final success/failure. Adding per-task resolved_tier to the JSON output enables post-run analysis of merge effectiveness.

constraints: Agent .md files must stay under ~400 words (token budget)
Doctor check must be fast (<5s) and not require network
Merge logging must not change MergeResult dataclass shape (backward compatible)
